free_text: Absolute level densities from neutron inelastic
scattering
Full report.
6 MV Van de Graaf accelerator.
Deuterium beam on 2.5 cm gas target at 1 atm
pressure, neutrons at 0 degree.
- The overall energy spread
Time of flight, 1.71 m flight path at low
energy and 5 m for high energy. Pre-acceleration
pulsing of deuterium beam, with klystron bunching
in the 6 MV terminal and increased current of
2.5 micro-Amp for high energy data.
Details in NP,32,610,1962.
.Background correction with dummy sample runs. A
small correction was made for neutrons produced
by deuterium reactions on target impurities of
oxygen and carbon.
Corrections are made for flux attenuation and
multiple scattering using tables of Cranberg et al.
(see REL-REF).
Statistical errors, one sigma.
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
REACTION code corrected in Subents 008-014. Meaningless
zeros were deleted from the data. BIB update. INC-SPECT
update. EN-RSL -> EN-RSL-FW.
Pure natural Na was contained in light Al can with
dimensions:outer diam. 4.5 cm, height 4.6 cm and 71.1g.
